bullet_points: Load the raw dataset, handling '.' as NaN.
Perform all required encoding for ordinal Likert scales, binary indicators, and frequency/ordinal variables.
Construct composite indices: Job Security (current/future) and Nature of Work Change (current/future).
Create "Income Rank" normalized by country.
Construct "Company Culture" (QGO_Index) and "Organizational Enablers" (QKB_Index) indices.
Create QKB_Index_Reduced (excluding QKB_1_4 and QKB_1_11) and binary "Not sure" indicators for QEA_2 and QEB_2.
Save the processed dataset.
Calculate and print Cronbach's alpha for QKB_Index and QGO_Index to verify internal consistency.
Save the validation results to a text file for the researcher.
Perform EFA on 16 binary QHD items using a tetrachoric correlation matrix and oblique rotation.
Compute McDonald's omega for extracted factors.
Flag and report items with communality < 0.3 or cross-loadings > 0.3.
Save "Positive Affect" and "Negative Affect" factor scores to the dataset and print descriptive statistics.
Perform LCA on job security indicators, comparing models with "Not sure" as a distinct category vs. missing.
Compute entropy for each solution (2–5 classes).
Save a BIC/AIC plot (2–5 classes) as a PNG.
Print class-conditional item-response probabilities and assign class membership to respondents.
Conduct Spearman rank correlations between predictors and outcomes with FDR (Benjamini-Hochberg) correction.
Report top 20 predictors per outcome with rho, adjusted p-values, and effect sizes.
Train a Random Forest regressor using 5-fold cross-validated permutation importance.
Print top 20 features with mean and standard deviation of permutation importance.
Implement mixed-effects multinomial logistic regression (random intercept for QDA) to predict class membership.
Include QKB_1_4 x QKB_1_11 interaction term.
Check VIFs and report McFadden's Pseudo-R-squared.
Perform mediation analysis (path: QKB_Index_Reduced -> "Negative Affect" -> class membership) using 500+ bootstrap samples.
Generate multi-panel figure for LCA metrics (BIC/AIC/Entropy).
Create heatmap of class-conditional item-response probabilities.
Plot predicted probability curves for class membership across QKB_Index and QGO_Index.
Create interaction plot for QKB_1_4 x QKB_1_11 on "Resiliently Optimistic" class probability.
Create horizontal bar chart of top-20 Random Forest permutation importances with error bars.
Synthesize all quantitative findings, reporting exact numerical values (class proportions, entropy, omega, odds ratios, bootstrapped indirect effects).
Interpret the "Not sure" category and latent classes.
Discuss the interaction between Regular Training and Employee Involvement.
Write the full Results section of the research report.
